steps.title: Use the stated surprise
steps.content: The text says scientists expected marsquakes to originate all over Mars because of cooling at the surface. Instead, the InSight data showed that all the marsquakes started from the same location, and that contrast is what surprised them.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A reverses cooling into rising surface temperature. Choice B invents different seismic wave types. Choice C invents a shortage of data from the lander. The remaining claim restates that every marsquake began at one location. The answer is D.
